title: Vertical Drama Poster System
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for mobile-first vertical drama posters that compress emotional hooks, romantic tension, and serialized campaign consistency into narrow streaming-cover formats.

en.title: Vertical Drama Poster System
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for mobile-first vertical drama posters that compress emotional hooks, romantic tension, and serialized campaign consistency into narrow streaming-cover formats.

zh-CN.title: 竖屏短剧海报系统
zh-CN.description: 测试在极窄竖幅里同时容纳情绪关系、平台封面钩子和分集系统一致性，让短剧海报既像投放物料也像连续封面。
